steps: The baker adds the same number of cupcakes every minute. After 1 minute: 3 cupcakes. After 2 minutes: 6 cupcakes. After 3 minutes: 9 cupcakes. The pattern shows an increase of 3 cupcakes per minute. Starting from 0 minutes, there would be 0 cupcakes. After 1 minute: 0 + 3 = 3. After 2 minutes: 3 + 3 = 6. After 3 minutes: 6 + 3 = 9. After 4 minutes: 9 + 3 = 12 cupcakes.
